34+ Products · G2–G5 · Full Wet Chemical Portfolio

Complete Wet Chemical
Portfolio for
Semiconductor Fabs

From RCA cleaning chemistry to EUV photoresist solvents and EV battery electrolytes — PureTech supplies the full range of electronic grade wet chemicals for every process step. Single-source qualification. Consistent lot-to-lot purity.

Industry Applications

Serving Every Segment of the
Semiconductor Supply Chain

From sub-3nm logic foundry to EV gigafactory — matched chemistry for every application.

View All Applications →

Metal limit G5
Sub-3nm · EUV · GAA FinFET
EIPA G5H₂O₂ G5NH₄OH G5

Logic & Foundry

SEMI G5 IPA, PGMEA, H₂O₂, NH₄OH, and H₂SO₄ for the full wafer clean sequence — from pre-diffusion piranha to post-CMP Marangoni drying.

View chemistry
200 L–IBC
High-volume pack
High-Volume · IBC/Bulk Supply
EIPA G4/G5H₂O₂ G4H₃PO₄ G4

DRAM & 3D NAND

High-volume IPA, H₂O₂, H₃PO₄, and NH₄OH for multi-step CMP post-clean, Si₃N₄ selective etch, and capacitor hole clean in DRAM and NAND fabrication.

View chemistry
2–5 μm
RDL line width
FOWLP · HBM · 2.5D · 3D-IC
PGMEA G4PGME G4NMP G4/G5

Advanced Packaging

PGMEA and PGME for RDL lithography, NMP for polyimide HDI dielectric, IPA for substrate clean — complete solvent portfolio for heterogeneous integration.

Battery chemical mkt
NMC · LFP · Solid-State
DMC G5EMC G4/G5DEC G4

EV Lithium Battery

G5 DMC and EMC for LiPF₆ electrolyte formulation, G5 NMP for PVDF cathode slurry — complete battery-grade solvent portfolio for EV gigafactory supply.

Gen 10.5 substrate
TFT-LCD · AMOLED · MicroLED
PGMEA G3TMAH G3NMP G3

Display & OLED

PGMEA for TFT photoresist patterning, TMAH 2.38% for positive resist development, NMP and DMSO for OLED organic layer coating — full display process portfolio.

Pharmaceutical & HPLC

LC-MS grade acetonitrile, HPLC gradient methanol, anhydrous DCM and THF — meeting the tightest UV absorbance and residue specs for GMP-compliant pharmaceutical analysis.

Why PureTech

The Standard for Electronic
Grade Chemical Supply

Built around the quality infrastructure that semiconductor fabs, OSATs, and battery manufacturers require.

28
Elements scanned per lot
by ICP-MS, Na through Bi
G5
Highest purity tier available
SEMI C1 Tier D · 6N purity
100%
Lots with full CoA
method-referenced, signed
ISO 3
Fill cleanroom class
in-line LPC per container
23+
Product lines
solvents · acids · bases · peroxides
100,000
t/a total capacity
across all product lines

Single-Source Qualification

Qualify one supplier for your complete wet chemical needs — solvents, process acids, oxidants, and bases. Reduces qualification timelines and supply complexity.

Lot-Specific CoA with Raw Data

Every shipment carries a full Certificate of Analysis with actual ICP-MS measured values, LPC counts, and GC assay data — not pass/fail statements.

ISO Class 3 Fill Environment

In-line liquid particle counting during fill certifies every container. G5 grade: ≤5 particles/mL at ≥0.5 μm, ≤20 at ≥0.2 μm.

Dedicated Field Application Support

Process engineers available for on-site qualification support, compatibility testing, and specification customization for non-standard applications.

Global Hazmat-Qualified Logistics

UN/ADR/IATA-classified temperature-controlled shipping to fabs in Asia, North America, and Europe with N₂ blanket during transport.

Electronic Grade Purity

SEMI Grade G2 → G5 Explained

Match the right grade to your process node. Every tier certified by ICP-MS and in-line LPC.

G2
180nm+
99.9%
Metals: ≤10 ppb
Particles: ≤100/mL

G3
45–180nm
99.99%
Metals: ≤2 ppb
Particles: ≤20/mL

99.999%

Particles: ≤10/mL
